title: DOGERS client
description: This project retextures dogs and the ui to look like my Minecraft skin.
body: This pack retextures the title screen panorama and the "minecraft java edition" to "DOGERS13 Client". It also adds 3d models to carrots, golden carrots, apples, gapples and e-gaples. The last main thing it does is renames all items' names that have "wolf" to "DOGERS" and renames and textures fire charges to fire.
